query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.title,
  p.state,
  p.priority,
  p.relevance_score,
  p.digest_safe,
  p.product_lane,
  COUNT(c.id) AS total_contacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.trust_tier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS send_ready_contacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.trust_tier IN ('named_unverified', 'apollo_email') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS enrichable_contacts
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.project_id = p.id AND c.rejection_reason IS NULL
WHERE p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
  AND p.digest_safe = 0
  AND p.relevance_score >= 50
GROUP BY p.id, p.title, p.state, p.priority, p.relevance_score, p.digest_safe, p.product_lane
HAVING send_ready_contacts = 0
ORDER BY p.relevance_score DESC, p.priority ASC
LIMIT 40;

  AND p.digest_safe = 0
  AND p.relevance_score >= 50
